allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Add debug logging for date parsing errors in restore *)

Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome" to activate' -e 'delay 0.5' -e 'key code 0 using command down' -e 'delay 0.3' -e 'key code 51' -e 'delay 0.5' -e 'key code 9 using command down' -e 'delay 1')
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix: re-render after saving sheet URL so restore button enables immediately *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add auto-restore from sheets on app startup if no local data *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Improve toast notifications: shorter duration \(1s\) and auto-clear text *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix timezone bug: use local date instead of UTC *)
